title: Global npm upgrade fails EBUSY while the MCP server runs (tree-sitter.node locked)
symptom: npm i -g @davesheffer/hunch during an active MCP session -> EBUSY copyfile on tree-sitter/prebuilds/win32-x64/tree-sitter.node; global stays on the old version and hooks keep running stale code
root_cause: The MCP server keeps the native tree-sitter binding loaded for its whole lifetime (reindex path), so Windows locks the .node file. Same failure class as the v1.0.0 better-sqlite3 EPERM, surviving via the one remaining native dep. Candidate fix: lazy-load tree-sitter only when parsing runs, so idle servers hold no native handles.

lineage.detected: manual: v1.3.0 rollout on the office machine
